ideas.title: Password Generator
ideas.tagline: Secure passwords with presets - Basic (12), Strong (16), Paranoid (24).
features: Keyboard shortcuts (1-3 for presets, Space to generate)
ideas.scenario: Need a secure password? Tap preset or customize length + complexity. Generate, copy, done. No password manager needed for quick cases.

ideas.title: Tip Calculator
ideas.tagline: Quick tip math with preset buttons - no calculator needed.
ideas.scenario: At restaurant, enter bill, tap tip %, see total instantly. Copy or export for expense tracking.

ideas.title: Random Decision Maker
ideas.tagline: Can't decide? Add options with weights, tap to let fate choose.
ideas.scenario: Stuck choosing between pizza, tacos, or sushi? Add them, set weights if you secretly prefer one, tap decide. Done.

ideas.title: URL Slug Generator
ideas.tagline: Convert titles to URL-friendly slugs with options (lowercase, stop words, max length).
ideas.scenario: Writing a blog post? Paste your title, get a clean URL slug instantly. Customize with options, copy, done.

ideas.title: WiFi QR Code Generator
ideas.tagline: Generate scannable WiFi QR codes - guests connect without typing passwords.
ideas.scenario: Hosting guests? Generate a WiFi QR code, print it, stick it on your fridge. They scan and connect - no password typing.

ideas.title: Text Case Converter
ideas.tagline: One-tap conversion: UPPERCASE, lowercase, camelCase, snake_case, and 5 more.
ideas.scenario: Paste text, instantly see it in 9 different cases. Click any to copy. Perfect for variable naming, formatting, or quick text transforms.

ideas.title: What Would This Cost In...
ideas.tagline: Absurd real-world equivalents for any dollar amount (lattes, avocados, Teslas).
ideas.scenario: Enter any dollar amount and see how many coffees, avocados, iPhones, or Teslas it could buy. Great for perspective on big purchases.

ideas.title: Parking Timer
ideas.tagline: Tap duration, never forget your meter - with notifications.
ideas.scenario: Parked at a meter? Tap the duration, get notified before it expires.

ideas.title: Quick Expense Split
ideas.tagline: Button-first bill splitting - tap tip presets, equal/custom splits, no math.
ideas.scenario: After dinner, quickly split the bill by tapping tip %, number of people, and copying the breakdown to share.

ideas.title: Idea Roulette
ideas.tagline: Random constraints for creative builds. Spin the wheel, embrace chaos.
ideas.scenario: You are stuck in a creative rut. Spin the wheel and build whatever absurd constraint combo you get.

ideas.title: Live Build Log
ideas.tagline: Track what you are building in real-time. Meta productivity for makers.
ideas.scenario: You build stuff but forget what you built. Log it as you go, export your build history.

ideas.title: Procrastination Speedrun
ideas.tagline: How long can you resist checking back? Gamified self-control timer.
ideas.scenario: You know you will check back in 3 minutes. Might as well track your failure.

ideas.title: Meeting Cost Calculator
ideas.tagline: Watch money burn in real-time during meetings. Brutal honesty.
ideas.scenario: That 2-hour planning meeting just cost dollar 2,400. Want to see the damage live?

ideas.title: Corporate Excuse Generator
ideas.tagline: Sliders for urgency, plausibility, and jargon. Meeting-ready excuses on demand.
ideas.scenario: You need to sound busy without saying anything. Adjust sliders, generate excuse, done.

ideas.title: One-Page Travel Checklist Generator
ideas.tagline: Pick trip type + duration and generate a checklist you can export.
ideas.scenario: You need a fast packing list without overthinking.

ideas.title: Gift Ideas + Budget
ideas.tagline: Collect gift ideas with price links and export a clean list.
ideas.scenario: You're planning gifts and want a quick organized list.

ideas.title: Clipboard → CSV Mapper
ideas.tagline: Paste messy lines, split into columns, export CSV.
ideas.scenario: You have messy text from chat/email and need a quick CSV export.

ideas.title: Quick Habit Contract
ideas.tagline: Define one habit, rules, and a 7-day commitment you can print/export.
ideas.scenario: You want a lightweight commitment sheet without a full tracker.

ideas.title: Meeting Agenda Builder
ideas.tagline: Build a tight agenda (topics + timeboxes) and export it.
ideas.scenario: Before a call, draft an agenda quickly and paste it into chat/email.

ideas.title: Decision Log (One-pager)
ideas.tagline: Capture decisions with date/context and export a clean log.
ideas.scenario: After a meeting, record decisions with short rationale and share/export.

ideas.title: Daily Priorities (3×3)
ideas.tagline: Pick 3 priorities + 3 tiny next actions, then export/copy.
ideas.scenario: In the morning you quickly decide what matters today and export it to send/share.

ideas.title: Home Inventory (mock)
ideas.tagline: Track stuff + warranty dates + reminders.
ideas.scenario: quick prototype

ideas.title: One-Tap Workout Planner (mock)
ideas.tagline: Pick goal → auto 20-min routine you can actually do.
ideas.scenario: quick prototype

ideas.title: Receipt Scanner (mock)
ideas.tagline: Drop a photo, it extracts items + totals (later OCR).
ideas.scenario: quick prototype

ideas.title: Smart Grocery List (2-min mode)
ideas.tagline: Ultra-fast add + store-aisle grouping + 'forgot again' reminders (mock)
ideas.scenario: quick prototype

ideas.title: Daily 'What should I build?' Spinner
ideas.tagline: A living idea generator that rotates prompts + constraints (mock)
ideas.scenario: quick prototype

ideas.title: Micro Habit Tracker (no guilt)
ideas.tagline: Track 3 tiny habits with streaks that forgive misses (mock)
ideas.scenario: quick prototype

ideas.title: Trip/Packing Assistant
ideas.tagline: Packing checklist + weather + last-minute tasks (mock)
ideas.scenario: quick prototype

ideas.title: Focus Timer
ideas.tagline: Minimal focus timer with gentle UX (mock)
ideas.scenario: Start a short focus session with one click; pause/reset fast.

ideas.title: Quick Mood Tracker
ideas.tagline: Log your mood with emoji buttons + energy/stress sliders - no typing required.
features: Emoji mood buttons (Happy, Sad, Angry, Anxious, Calm, Tired, Excited, Neutral)
Tag buttons (Work, Sleep, Exercise, Social, etc.)
ideas.scenario: Throughout the day, quickly log how you feel by tapping emoji buttons, adjusting sliders for energy and stress, and optionally picking context tags. Review patterns over time and export your data.

ideas.title: Breath Timer
ideas.tagline: Button-driven breathing exercises — 4-7-8, Box, 5-5 patterns.
ideas.scenario: Need to calm down or focus? Pick a breathing pattern, tap start, follow the circle. Perfect for meditation, anxiety, or pre-sleep.

ideas.title: Unit Converter
ideas.tagline: Button-driven unit conversions — Temp, Distance, Weight, Volume.
ideas.scenario: Need to convert units quickly? Pick category, tap preset or enter value, get instant results. Perfect for cooking, travel, or science.

ideas.title: Color Palette Generator
ideas.tagline: Button-driven color schemes — Complementary, Analogous, Triadic, Monochromatic.
features: G to generate, C to copy all
ideas.scenario: Need a color scheme for design? Pick scheme type, generate palette, tap any color to copy hex. Perfect for quick color inspiration.

ideas.title: Time Zone Converter
ideas.tagline: Button-driven timezone conversion — 6 major cities, live updates.
ideas.scenario: Need to check time in another city? Tap city preset, see live time. Perfect for scheduling calls across timezones.

ideas.title: QR Code Generator
ideas.tagline: Generate QR codes from text/URLs — WiFi, vCard, SMS, Email presets.
features: G to generate, D to download
ideas.scenario: Need a QR code? Enter text or URL, or use preset templates for WiFi/contact sharing. Generate and download instantly.
